summary: Threshold + signature-scope contract for the eval issue-candidate pipeline. Recurring-signature dedupe must hold MIN_RECURRENT_SIGNATURE_COUNT >= 2 unless a critical-severity bypass applies. Adding new fields here is the supported way to tune dedupe sensitivity without a Rust source change.
operational_notes: Lowering min_recurrent_signature_count below the floor is forbidden; the guard fails closed when the policy declares any value below the floor.
Critical-severity rows bypass the dedupe threshold but still emit through the same proposal-only path.
If the dedupe needs an explicit time window, extend signature_scope with a time-bucket field rather than weakening the threshold.
